description.value: Price 3,000 gp; Slot none; CL 5th; Weight 8 lbs.; Aura faint universal DESCRIPTION Each of these rune-carved brass rings is keyed to a specific spell at creation. When using the Use Magic Device skill to activate a scroll or spell trigger item based on that spell, the bearer gains a +10 insight bonus on the skill check. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 1,500 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells guidance; Special creator must have 10 ranks in the Use Magic Device skill
